Container.Name: Warden
Container.Overview: Automate *Arr searches and stalled-download cleanup for Sonarr, Radarr, and Lidarr.
Container.Description: Warden combines Vigilance search scheduling with Defence queue cleanup. Configure your *Arr instances in config.yaml and provide API keys through this template or the container environment.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Warden config directory. Place config.yaml and optionally .env here. Container loads .env on startup — explicit variables above take priority.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: IANA timezone for logs and active-hours windows.

Config.Name: Warden Mode
Config.Description: warden runs Vigilance and Defence. Use vigilance for search only or defence for cleanup only.

Config.Name: Sonarr API Key
Config.Description: Optional Sonarr API key referenced by config.yaml as ${SONARR_API_KEY}.

Config.Name: Radarr API Key
Config.Description: Optional Radarr API key referenced by config.yaml as ${RADARR_API_KEY}.

Config.Name: Lidarr API Key
Config.Description: Optional Lidarr API key referenced by config.yaml as ${LIDARR_API_KEY}.
